'''âk-p-ng''' ('''kapanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hick|hick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hick|hick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kapanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kapangithi|kapangithi]] || [[word:kapangiji|kapangiji]] || [[word:kapangishi|kapangishi]] || [[word:kapangi|kapangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapanguthuth|kapanguthuth]] || [[word:kapangujuj|kapangujuj]] || [[word:kapangushush|kapangushush]] || [[word:kapang|kapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapanguthu|kapanguthu]] || [[word:kapanguju|kapanguju]] || [[word:kapangushu|kapangushu]] || [[word:kapangu|kapangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapangufuth|kapangufuth]] || [[word:kapangufuj|kapangufuj]] || [[word:kapangufush|kapangufush]] || [[word:kapanguf|kapanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kapangethe|kapangethe]] || [[word:kapangeje|kapangeje]] || [[word:kapangeshe|kapangeshe]] || [[word:kapange|kapange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapangothoth|kapangothoth]] || [[word:kapangojoj|kapangojoj]] || [[word:kapangoshosh|kapangoshosh]] || [[word:kapang|kapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapangotho|kapangotho]] || [[word:kapangojo|kapangojo]] || [[word:kapangosho|kapangosho]] || [[word:kapango|kapango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapangofoth|kapangofoth]] || [[word:kapangofoj|kapangofoj]] || [[word:kapangofosh|kapangofosh]] || [[word:kapangof|kapangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kapangĂŠthĂŠ|kapangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kapangĂŠjĂŠ|kapangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kapangĂŠshĂŠ|kapangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kapangĂŠ|kapangĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapangathath|kapangathath]] || [[word:kapangajaj|kapangajaj]] || [[word:kapangashash|kapangashash]] || [[word:kapang|kapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapangatha|kapangatha]] || [[word:kapangaja|kapangaja]] || [[word:kapangasha|kapangasha]] || [[word:kapanga|kapanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapangafath|kapangafath]] || [[word:kapangafaj|kapangafaj]] || [[word:kapangafash|kapangafash]] || [[word:kapangaf|kapangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kapangasha|kapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokapangasha|gokapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikapangasha|gokikapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kapangnĂŒsha|kapangnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokapangnknĂŒsha|gokapangnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikapangnĂŒsha|gokikapangnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kapangshĂ«sha|kapangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokapangnkshĂ«sha|gokapangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikapangshĂ«sha|gokikapangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapangrosha|kapangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapangnkrosha|gokapangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapangrosha|gokikapangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kapangmusha|kapangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapangnkmusha|gokapangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapangmusha|gokikapangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kapangsherasha|kapangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokapangnksherasha|gokapangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikapangsherasha|gokikapangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kapangasha|kapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokapangnkngasha|gokapangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikapangasha|gokikapangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kapangyasha|kapangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokapangnkyasha|gokapangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikapangyasha|gokikapangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kapangyamasha|kapangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokapangnkyamasha|gokapangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikapangyamasha|gokikapangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kapangnĂŒshĂ«sha|kapangnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokapangnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokapangnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikapangnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikapangnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapangnĂŒrosha|kapangnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapangnknĂŒrosha|gokapangnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapangnĂŒrosha|gokikapangnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapangnĂŒmusha|kapangnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapangnknĂŒmusha|gokapangnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapangnĂŒmusha|gokikapangnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kapangshĂ«nĂŒsha|kapangshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokapangnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokapangnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikapangshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikapangshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapangshĂ«rosha|kapangshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapangnkshĂ«rosha|gokapangnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapangshĂ«rosha|gokikapangshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapangshĂ«musha|kapangshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapangnkshĂ«musha|gokapangnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapangshĂ«musha|gokikapangshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kapangronĂŒsha|kapangronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokapangnkronĂŒsha|gokapangnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikapangronĂŒsha|gokikapangronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kapangroshĂ«sha|kapangroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokapangnkroshĂ«sha|gokapangnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikapangroshĂ«sha|gokikapangroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kapangromusha|kapangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokapangnkromusha|gokapangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikapangromusha|gokikapangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kapangmunĂŒsha|kapangmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokapangnkmunĂŒsha|gokapangnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikapangmunĂŒsha|gokikapangmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kapangmushĂ«sha|kapangmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokapangnkmushĂ«sha|gokapangnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikapangmushĂ«sha|gokikapangmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kapangmurosha|kapangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokapangnkmurosha|gokapangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikapangmurosha|gokikapangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kapang|kapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠpĂŠng|kĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokapang|hokapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠpĂŠng|hokĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokapang|hohokapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠpĂŠng|hohokĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkapang|nĂŒkapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠpĂŠng|nĂŒkĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkapang|nĂŒnĂŒkapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠpĂŠng|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkapang|nĂŻkapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠpĂŠng|nĂŻkĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkapang|nĂŻnĂŻkapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠpĂŠng|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukapang|lukapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠpĂŠng|lukĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukapang|lulukapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠpĂŠng|lulukĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likapang|likapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠpĂŠng|likĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikapang|lilikapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠpĂŠng|lilikĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokapang|kokapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠpĂŠng|kokĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokapang|kokokapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠpĂŠng|kokokĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekapang|kekapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠpĂŠng|kekĂŠpĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekapang|kekekapang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠpĂŠng|kekekĂŠpĂŠng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
